expectations.text: Rewrites passive constructions into active voice with human subjects
expectations.evidence: All sentences use active voice with human subjects: 'You keep using the ones', 'Pick a real friction point', 'build a habit', 'let the relationship carry'.
none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Removes throat-clearing opener ('In today's rapidly evolving landscape')
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Most tools that promise better collaboration get ignored within a month' -- direct claim, no throat-clearing filler.

expectations.text: Breaks or rewrites at least one three-item list into a different rhythm (two items, or varied structure)
expectations.evidence: Final sentence retains a three-item list: 'Pick a real friction point, build a habit around talking about it, and let the relationship carry the work forward.'
